programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Tulsa, a suspected stolen vehicle leads officers on a massive chase; in Richland, officers assist a stranded motorist; they are interrupted by a report of an alleged home invasion.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, a driver is surprised when police reportedly find a gun tucked under his seat; in Lawrence, a man suspected of impersonating his son finally drops the act.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: Officers in Richland County investigate a suspected double carjacking; in Warwick, a driver causes a serious crash tied to road rage; in Salinas, police search for a suspect believed to be hiding in a residence.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: A K9 leads the charge after a Greene County pursuit; in Warwick, a homeowner's security footage captures a suspected crime in progress; in El Paso, officers respond to a tipsy visitor knocking on neighborhood doors.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts

Later, the ladies welcome various celebrities, who join them in a chat or perform for the audience. The

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.desc: School's out for summer, and the teens are up to no good. Jenson plans to double cross Gemma. Abigail begins to put down roots in the village. And Maddox and Dee Dee grow closer.

programme.title: Countdown

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Lilith tells Frasier that she's been having an affair with a colleague. Sam hires a bouncer when bikers start drinking at Cheers.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The Girl in the Plastic Bubble: Frasier climbs out onto a high window ledge in protest when Lilith reveals that she plans to spend a year sealed in a biosphere with her lover.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Michael showcases a self-penned story at his school: The Angry Family. Cue plenty of finger-pointing among the Barones, which kinda proves Michael's point.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank forces Marco to choose either Marie or him as a friend. Ray sides with Frank because he doesn't approve of his mother having a male friend.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray loses his wedding ring and is propositioned by a woman at the airport. When Debra finds out what happened, she pretends to be single too..

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier invites the new station manager home for dinner to fix him up with Daphne. But he thinks it's Frasier who's interested in him.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: After helping a pregnant taxi driver to give birth, Niles practises being a father by cradling a sack of flour in his arms.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles accompany Martin to the closing of his favourite bar. But they soon realise they have shares in the company forcing its closure.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: After publicly denouncing Seattle as a 'soggy' city, Frasier must battle the angry words and 'gifts' of die-hard Seattleites.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike gambles on a 1935 Auburn car that's been in a barn for two decades. The guys are on shaky ground in Iowa. Dave reveals the results of Mike's biggest investment.

programme.title: Jersey and Guernsey
programme.desc: Documentary series celebrating the beauty and historical heritage of these beautiful Channel islands, following the lives of residents whose families have lived there for generations.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders

programme.title: Police Interceptors

programme.desc: A car linked to organised crime is hunted down and stopped in dramatic fashion, police intervene in a family dispute, and a hooded man is behaving threateningly towards young women..
